pyqgis_plugin.name: MapThemeToolbox
pyqgis_plugin.description: Map Theme toolbox: Modify, Repair, Present themes, Sync and Auto-Save
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined toolbar for managing QGIS Map Themes: modify mutual layer visibility across themes, repair broken layer paths, present themes with a single click, sync with Excel/CSV/GeoPackage, and auto-save the project on a timer.

pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB QGIS
pyqgis_plugin.description: View RORB results: browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.32: Fix AttributeError on _cmp_scenario_rows before Compare tab is built. v2.30: Persist scenarios across sessions; rename scenario; remove Compare tab; rainfall overlay on hydrograph viewer. v2.29: Rename plugin to RORB QGIS. v2.28: Hydrograph + hyetograph zero-padded at start/end; editable export name column in preview; rainfall read from .stm when .out has none.

pyqgis_plugin.name: Profile Tool
pyqgis_plugin.description: Create cross-section profile grids for geotechnical and hydrogeological sections
pyqgis_plugin.about: Draw an empty grid as a vector layer at (0,0) by specifying X distance, X segment interval, Y min/max RL, and Y interval. Foundation for a full cross-section profile tool.
